Museum Passes We have passes available for library card holders to a variety of museums in Boston, Peabody, Salem, and more
Book Meeting/Study Room Meeting/study rooms available for residents of Danvers
Research & Services Your resource center From e-library services, online resources, and our teen tech center, to study rooms and device charging stations, find all the information you need to know, right here.
Archives Historical research The Archival Center houses a wonderful and diverse collection of materials that relate to the history of Salem Village and Danvers from the 17th century to the present.
Kids Events & Resources Looking for help on a school project or needing a book recommendation for your child? We have many different resources with homework help, learning games, and our kids’ event calendar. Check it out!

pass_page.policy_text:
To limit museum types being displayed, check the corresponding categories:
To select a museum, click “Details/Reserve”, then select which Pass to reserve.

Designed for both children and families, the Museum exhibits focus on science, culture, environmental awareness, health & fitness, and the arts, emphasizing hands-on engagement and learning through experience, and employing play as a tool to spark the inherent creativity, curiosity, and imagination of children."} Boston Children's Museum 308 Congress Street, Boston, MA 02210617-426-6500http://www.bostonchildrensmuseum.org/[Details/Reserve]
Boston Children's Museum Founded in 1913 by the Science Teachers' Bureau, the Boston Children's Museum is the second oldest children's museum in the world and one of the few that maintain a collection. Designed for both children and families, the Museum exhibits focus on science, culture, environmental awareness, health & fitness, and the arts, emphasizing hands-on engagement and learning through experience, and employing play as a tool to spark the inherent creativity, curiosity, and imagination of children.
Categories: Children, Crafts, Family, Technology
Pass Type: Printable/Digital Coupon Pass (link delivered by email)
Pass Benefits This pass provides 50% off discount for up to 4 people.
To use this past you MUST make a reservation on the museum's website. To do this:
Visit: https://bostonchildrensmuseum.org/ticketing/
Select "Discount Programs"
Select "Purchase Discount Program Tickets"
Select "Half Price Library Tickets"
Select the correct date (must match date of the pass)
Select the number of tickets (maximum 4)
Select "Check out" and complete your payment
You will be sent the tickets via email
The day of your visit, please bring both the library coupon pass and the ticket from the Museum. 
Your coupon and tickets  can be printed out or shown on a smartphone or other device. 
If you have problems ordering your museum ticket, email: Orders@BostonChildrensMuseum.org
The Museum is open from 9am to 4pm Wednesday through Monday. It is closed on Tuesdays. 
This is a printable pass. You will receive the pass in your email or library staff can print it for you after you have made a reservation.
Reserve a Pass Reserve a Pass

Organized to optimize social, cognitive and motor development, areas include a large room with a climbing structure, slides, and swings; an arts and crafts room; a room with a train table; a lunch area with appropriately sized furniture; a glow-in-the-dark planet room; among others. There is a coffee shop and free Wi-Fi on the premises. Please check the website for the requirements of entry."} The Children's Piazza 83 Pine Street, Unit F, Peabody, MA 01960978-817-2809https://www.thechildrenspiazza.com/[Details/Reserve]
The Children's Piazza Located in Peabody, MA, The Children's Piazza is a space is designed for young children—aged 0 to 6—to learn through unstructured play. Organized to optimize social, cognitive and motor development, areas include a large room with a climbing structure, slides, and swings; an arts and crafts room; a room with a train table; a lunch area with appropriately sized furniture; a glow-in-the-dark planet room; among others. There is a coffee shop and free Wi-Fi on the premises. Please check the website for the requirements of entry.
Categories: Children, Family
Pass Type: Coupon Pass (must be picked up from the branch, but does not require returning)
Pass Benefits This pass provides 50% off admission for one family/same household per day. The pass does not cover members of the group who are not immediate family/household.
Weekends (Saturdays) and the following holidays are excluded: Thanksgiving, Christmas, New Year's Eve, New Year's Day, and the 4th of July.
Please visit The Children's Piazza website (thechildrenspiazza.com) to make a reservation prior to your visit. Reservations required for entry. Pass only valid on date reserved.
The email confirmation sent to you serves as your discount pass. Please present this pass (either printed or on your mobile device) upon entry to the Children's Piazza. Library staff may print this pass for you upon request.
